HomeContact

Contact

Contact Form

To contact Valerie, please complete form, with all the details so we can process the case quickly.

This helps us prevent spam, thank you.

Or you can also contact Valerie by letter, email or telephone. When contacting by letter or email, please provide your full postal address to confirm you live in the Walsall & Bloxwich constituency. There is a Parliamentary protocol which means MPs can only take up cases on behalf of our own constituents.

Constituency Office:

Lichfield House
27-31 Lichfield Street
Walsall, WS1 1TJ

Tel: 01922 635 835

Email: [email protected]

Westminster Office:

Valerie Vaz MP
House of Commons,
London, SW1A 0AA

Tel: 020 7219 2237
Email: [email protected]

Find Us

To Contact Valerie

Please click the link below and complete the form with all your details so your case can be processed.

Contact form

Surgeries

Valerie holds regular surgeries which  are currently by telephone.

If you wish to contact Valerie, please use the contact form on the website or email Valerie at [email protected] or telephone on 01922 635835. You can call Monday-Friday 10:30 am to 1:00pm.

Next surgery: 17 April 2026 at 2pm

Claimant Rate in Walsall and Bloxwich

Figures published today show that in March 2026:

There were 6,065 claimants in Walsall and Bloxwich constituency, which was 7.7% of the population aged 16-64. The equivalent UK claimant rate was 4.0%.

Number of claimants was down 335 from last year.

There were 1,320 claimants aged 18-24.
